options.name: Simulation length
options.description: Selects what parameter determines the length of the simulation. If EDT is selected, the Impulse response length variable will have no effect, and vice versa.

options.name: Energy decay threshold
options.description: The threshold (in dB) until when the DE method simulates. Only used if the Simulation length parameter is set to EDT.

options.name: Impulse response length
options.description: The length of the impulse response the DE method will simulate. Only used if the Simulation length parameter is set to IR length.

options.name: Speed of sound
options.description: The speed of sound in the medium (air).

options.name: Characteristic length (mesh)
options.description: Distance between nodes that the meshing tool aims for (in meters). Higher values yield shorter simulation times, but might cause errors due to a too coarse mesh.
